_meta.summary: Dual-role milestone approval system. No token governance. Admin controls are centralized and held by deployer until transferred to a multi-sig.

owner.label: Deployer wallet
owner.note: Recommend transferring to Gnosis Safe before public launch.

factory_control.emergency_authority: None at factory level — per-campaign pause available

DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE.description: Full control over campaign roles and pause/unpause.
can_do: Typically the campaign creator / factory owner

OPERATOR_ROLE.description: NGO or operational team managing the campaign.
can_do: Approve milestones (first of two required approvals)
Cannot disburse alone — requires DIRECTOR_ROLE co-approval
Approve milestones (second of two required approvals)
Cannot disburse alone — requires OPERATOR_ROLE co-approval

MINTER_ROLE.held_by: Each Campaign contract — granted by factory at campaign creation
can_do: Mint soulbound NFT receipts for donors

centralized: Factory ownership (deployer wallet — recommend multi-sig after launch)
decentralized: Milestone disbursal requires 2-of-2 role approval (OPERATOR + DIRECTOR)
All donation records immutable on Polygon
NFT receipts cannot be revoked or burned by admin
No admin backdoor for fund withdrawal
